programme.title: Forbidden Science - Love Doll
programme.desc: Forbidden Science is a unique blend of noir science fiction and erotic programming. Set in the near future, the stories revolve around the evil corporation, 4Ever Innovations, whose young and brilliant scientists download and sell memories. They replace those we've lost with clones and devise technology that helps us live out our greatest fantasies; from saving a failed relationship, to creating the perfect lover, to being irresistible to the opposite sex - but sometimes our deepest desires come at a terrible price. 4Ever offers customers the opportunity to live out their fantasies in a virtual world but there are secrets within 4Ever Innovations that may cost you your life.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: The day kicks off with a one-of-a-kind “hatting ceremony” as Don Mann is crowned—then quite literally set on fire. But there’s no time to admire the flames; Ken Shamrock is waiting with another round of punishing Lion’s Den training. With Iron Man training just one day away, the pressure is at an all-time high. Contestant Landon reflects on his past Surviving Mann experience, paying tribute to the mentors who guided him—and now stepping into that role himself. The countdown to mission time begins as gear is packed, coordinates plotted, and details roll in via Red Cat Drones. With the ISR team deployed, the first phase of the mission is underway. Every contestant must be ready to deliver their cover for status in an instant—because in this game, hesitation can be the difference between success and failure.

programme.desc: Now available in amazing 4k UHD Resolution “A Journey through Europe” features the stunning photography and cinematography of Olof & Elizabeth Carmel. This 60 minute video is a relaxing and inspiring visual voyage through some of the most scenic regions of Europe. Countries featured include France, Italy, Sweden, England, Spain, and Greece. This video includes a beautiful instrumental soundtrack. Run time is 60 minutes.

programme.title: Death Valley & Mono Lake
programme.desc: Experience the dramatic beauty of Death Valley, from sunrise over the sand dunes to the colorful formations of Zabriske point. Explore the unique limestone formations known as "tufa towers", the amazing bird life, and relaxing serenity of Mono Lake, an inland sea at the base of the Sierra Mountains. Bonus footage of the geothermal "hot creek" in the Sierras. This film is newly extended with awe-inspiring footage of the nesting Ospreys and aerial views of Mono Lake!
